title: Flowing zinc slurry for long-duration energy storage - Nature Energy
gist: Researchers report a flowing Zn slurry (FZS) battery that uses ligand-assisted confinement to suppress zinc dendrite growth, achieving 99.94% Coulombic efficiency and over 5,000 hours/5,500 cycles of stable operation. The work targets the open problem of low-cost, long-life, safe long-duration energy storage needed to integrate renewables.

insights.claim: A flowing Zn slurry battery achieves 99.94% Coulombic efficiency in FZS||Cu asymmetric cells at 8 mA cm-2.
insights.speaker: Nature Energy
insights.so_what: Coulombic efficiency near 99.94% is the threshold-level metric grid storage developers watch; it signals the chemistry could be commercially durable.
insights.quote: it achieves a Coulombic efficiency of 99.94%

insights.claim: FZS symmetric cells operate reversibly for 5,128 hours at 22.5 mA cm-2 and 135 mAh cm-2 under continuous flow.
insights.speaker: Nature Energy
insights.so_what: Over 5,000 hours of reversible cycling addresses the cycle-life barrier that has blocked zinc chemistries from long-duration grid storage.
insights.quote: symmetric cells operate reversibly for 5,128 h at 22.5 mA cm−2, 135 mAh cm−2

insights.claim: FZS||MnO2 full cells retain 81.1% capacity after 5,500 cycles at 10 A g-1, and FZS||O2 full cells deliver 1.65 Ah over 100 hours at 1.35 mA cm-2.
insights.speaker: Nature Energy
insights.so_what: Demonstrated full-cell longevity across both MnO2 and oxygen cathodes shows the slurry approach generalizes beyond a single chemistry.
insights.quote: FZS | |MnO2 full cells retain 81.1% capacity after 5,500 cycles at 10 A g−1

insights.claim: Ligand-assisted confinement coordinating onto Zn nanoparticle surfaces suppresses excessive Zn growth and parasitic reactions, enabling uniform monodisperse Zn nanocrystal deposition throughout the slurry.
insights.speaker: Nature Energy
insights.so_what: The ligand-confinement mechanism is the technical moat; controlling zinc deposition uniformity is the historic bottleneck for zinc battery commercialization.
insights.quote: suppressing excessive Zn growth and parasitic reactions, enabling uniform, monodisperse Zn nanocrystal deposition

insights.claim: Few existing technologies simultaneously achieve low cost, long cycle life, and high safety, despite long-duration energy storage being critical for integrating renewable energy.
insights.speaker: Nature Energy
insights.so_what: Defines the unmet need that determines which storage chemistries can win the grid-scale market as renewables penetration rises.
insights.quote: yet few technologies simultaneously achieve low cost, long cycle life and high safety

insights.claim: The work provides a framework for scalable, stable metal-slurry-based flow battery systems, demonstrated with a large-area flow battery built in collaboration with the Dalian Institute of Chemical Physics.
insights.speaker: Nature Energy
insights.so_what: Metal-slurry flow chemistry as a reusable platform, plus a large-area demonstration, signals a path toward scale-up rather than a lab-only result.
insights.quote: providing a framework for scalable, stable metal-slurry-based flow battery systems
